title: Feather Elytra
description: This is a texturepack which makes the Elytra look like it is made out of Feathers
body:
This texturepack will make your Elytra look like it is made out of feathers!

Note: 
- 1 **You NEED to de-equip your cape for the texturepack to funktion properly**
- 2 **Even though Minecraft says that the Texturepack is for an older/newer Version, it ist compatible with Versions going from 1.9 to the newest one right now as of the 6. of December 2025 though it is probably compatible with future Versions too.**

Made with love from Venaticshelf408 :)
